common.tagline: Finds draught beer wherever you are

nearby.title: Beer on tap
nearby.emptyBody: We couldn't find a single place with beer on tap around you. Try again, or come back when you've wandered somewhere thirstier.
nearby.fallbackBanner: Location unavailable — showing České Budějovice city centre.
nearby.deniedBanner: Location permission denied. Allow it so we can find beer near you.

detail.verifyHint: Do the prices match? Confirming helps everyone drink informed.
detail.priceUpdated: Price updated. Thanks for helping out!
detail.beerAdded: Beer added to the tap list.
detail.removeBeerBody: It will disappear from the tap list. If it's the last draught beer, the venue will be hidden entirely.
detail.gone: This place no longer pours draught beer.
detail.offlineSnapshot: Saved from an earlier visit. Price verification works only for places currently around you.

priceEditor.title: New price
priceEditor.subtitle: {{beer}} — {{venue}}
priceEditor.validation: Enter a price between {{min}} and {{max}} CZK.

addBeer.title: Add a beer on tap
addBeer.subtitle: Pick the beer and set its price
addBeer.empty: Every beer from our catalog is already on tap here. Impressive.

compass.title: Compass
compass.pointing: The arrow points straight to your beer
compass.lowAccuracy: Compass is imprecise. Wave your phone in a figure eight to calibrate.
compass.unavailable: This device reports no compass data. The arrow shows the target direction with the phone facing north.

filters.title: Filters
filters.emptyBody: No place around here matches your filters. Try loosening them a little.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.emptyBody: Tap the heart on any pub and it will be waiting here, even when it's far away.

settings.title: Settings
settings.resetEditsBody: Removes your local price and tap-list edits and restores the original data.
settings.aboutBody: NearestPub finds the closest place pouring draught beer, walks you there by map or compass, and lets the community keep beer prices honest. All venue data in this build is a local simulation.

toasts.errorGeneric: Couldn't save that. Please try again.
